form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after 11 months finished second in a small field at Taunton on March 24 over 3300m, 4 len behind Arms Park carrying 71kg at $12. Previously second-up finished sixth of 7 starters at Haydock Park on May 10 over 3140m, 8 len behind So Proud carrying 70kg at $81. That form remains a long way short of what's needed here however.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after three months finished third of 21 starters at Cheltenham on March 11 over 3300m, 2.75 len behind The Mourne Rambler carrying 73kg at $9. Previously second-up won by 1.0 len Ascot in a LR on December 19 over 3100m on rain affected going defeating Tally Ho Back with 71kg at $2.40. Has the proven class to land this.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after having raced just once last preparation ran last at Newbury in the LR on February 7 over 3300m, on rain affected going; 122 len behind A Likeable Rogue carrying 73kg at $13. form.formComment: Racing second-up. Won at first race start ran on from midfield and won by a 0.0 len Sandown Park on November 9 over 3220m defeating Saint Invictus with 69.5kg at $13 in a flat. form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Comes off a 49 day let-up. Last run raced on the speed and boxed on steadily finished fourth of 13 runners at Kempton Park on February 21 over 3200m, 5.5 len behind Fine Shot with 74kg at $5. Start before tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily finished second of 9 runners at Warwick on December 31 over 3200m, 6 len behind Risky Obsession carrying 72.5kg at $2. Outside chance on best form.

form.formComment: Is second-up today and making a debut in a jumps race. Last start finished win in a small field at Fontwell Park on March 14 over 3500m, slow track; 6 len behind The Perfect Poet carrying 69.5kg at $2.40. In tougher company but worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Is second-up today and making a debut in a jumps race. Last start finished third of 13 runners at Kempton Park on February 21 over 3200m, 4 len behind Fine Shot carrying 68.5kg at $4.30. Appeared for just the second time, and was resuming after a spell of 103 days, when he finished third in a 3200m contest at Kempton Park recently, beaten 4 lengths. Not surprising if he features.
